name: io.github.luxemarasound-stack/budget-ceiling-enforcer
title: Budget Ceiling Enforcer
description: Prevents runaway cloud costs from AI agent usage. Enforces hard budget limits with configurable actions: throttle, pause, alert, or kill. Spend projection and webhook alerts. Pay-per-check via x402 (USDC on Base).

headers.name: X-Payment-Tx
headers.description: x402 payment transaction hash (USDC on Base). Send 0.02 USDC to receive this hash.
